{{CargoRelic
|name=Energy Block
|class_id=20858
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=Energy Blocks represent a potent energy source, synthesized through specialized refinement processes from a rare mineral. This mineral is exclusively found on a distant planetary body where, according to reports, all indigenous lifeforms exhibit mechanical characteristics...
|fame=19
|art=14
|fth=14
|civ=13
|tech=30
|ss1=Per 5 Rocket Tech LVLs, Snail HP +50<br>Rocket Tech Upgraded: 50/50
|ss2=Per 5 Rocket Tech LVLs, Snail HP +55<br>Rocket Tech Upgraded: 50/50
|ss3=Per 5 Rocket Tech LVLs, Snail HP +60<br>Rocket Tech Upgraded: 50/50
|ss4=Per 5 Rocket Tech LVLs, Snail HP +60<br>Rocket Tech Upgraded: 50/50
|ss7=Per 5 Rocket Tech LVLs, Snail HP +60<br>Rocket Tech Upgraded: 50/50<br> (Awakened)
}}
